title: Agents
subtitle: Manage your OpenClaw agents and see which channel accounts are routed to each one
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent with both name and ID. Agent ID must be unique and only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
createDialog.idHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (for example: trading-expert-2).

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from GeeClaw? Its managed workspace and runtime directories will be removed as well.

settingsDialog.title: Agent Settings: {{name}}
settingsDialog.noChannels: This agent does not own any channel accounts yet.
settingsDialog.skillsHint: Choose between the default skill scope or up to 6 specific skills.
settingsDialog.skillsManagedHint: This managed agent can add extra skills, but preset skills cannot be removed until you unmanage it.

skillScope.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, or description

settingsDialog.unmanageDescription: Unmanaging keeps the current config but removes preset restrictions on persona files and preset skills.

unmanageConfirm.firstMessage: This will unlock preset persona files and allow preset skills to be removed.
unmanageConfirm.secondMessage: This action cannot be automatically restored. The current preset files stay as-is, but future edits will no longer be protected.

marketplace.managedHint: Installs as a managed preset agent

removeChannelDialog.title: Unbind Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Unbind {{name}} from this agent? The account config will stay on the Channels page.

empty: No extra agents yet. Create one to enable multi-agent routing.
